role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Agent correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed within its domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues as declared.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (sclerophyllous, maquis) and biome distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings, signs, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (delineator posts, guardrails) to distinguish countries.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Spain. The agents adhered to their roles, and the meta/regulatory agents provided the decisive evidence (delineator posts) that distinguished Spain from other Mediterranean candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described Mediterranean scrub and limestone terrain.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described blue/white chevrons and white posts.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the specific delineator post style.
